Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.audio

Class FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.jvm.audio.FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio.FlixelSoundBackend.Factory
public class FlixelMiniAudioSoundHandler extends Object implements me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio.FlixelSoundBackend.Factory
JVM implementation of FlixelSoundBackend.Factory backed by the MiniAudio native library.

This factory owns a single MiniAudio engine instance that is created in the constructor and disposed when disposeEngine() is called. All sounds and groups are created through the engine.

    Description

    Creates the handler and initialises the MiniAudio engine.
